gcc -std=gnu99 -DPCP_VERSION=\"6.3.0\" -fPIC -fno-strict-aliasing -D_GNU_SOURCE -Wshadow -Wno-array-bounds -Wall -O2 -g   -c -o trivial.o trivial.c
gcc -std=gnu99 -DPCP_VERSION=\"6.3.0\" -fPIC -fno-strict-aliasing -D_GNU_SOURCE -Wshadow -Wno-array-bounds -Wall -O2 -g -o pmdatrivial  -Wall  -L/usr/lib64 -Wl,-rpath=/usr/lib64   trivial.o      -lpcp_pmda -lpcp -lm -lpthread  
--- initial state
# 
# Name  Id      IPC     IPC Params      File/Cmd
# Performance Metrics Domain Specifications
# This file is automatically generated during the build
root	1	pipe	binary		/var/lib/pcp/pmdas/root/pmdaroot
pmcd	2	dso	pmcd_init	/var/lib/pcp/pmdas/pmcd/pmda_pmcd.so
proc	3	pipe	binary		/var/lib/pcp/pmdas/proc/pmdaproc -d 3
pmproxy	4	dso	pmproxy_init	/var/lib/pcp/pmdas/mmv/pmda_mmv.so
xfs	11	pipe	binary		/var/lib/pcp/pmdas/xfs/pmdaxfs -d 11
sample	29	pipe	binary 		/var/lib/pcp/pmdas/sample/pmdasample -d 29 
sampledso	30	dso	sample_init	/var/lib/pcp/pmdas/sample/pmda_sample.so 
linux	60	pipe	binary		/var/lib/pcp/pmdas/linux/pmdalinux
mmv	70	dso	mmv_init	/var/lib/pcp/pmdas/mmv/pmda_mmv.so 
kvm	95	pipe	binary		/var/lib/pcp/pmdas/kvm/pmdakvm -d 95
jbd2	122	dso	jbd2_init	/var/lib/pcp/pmdas/jbd2/pmda_jbd2.so 
dm	129	pipe	binary 		/var/lib/pcp/pmdas/dm/pmdadm -d 129 
simple	253	pipe	binary 		/var/lib/pcp/pmdas/simple/pmdasimple -d 253 

[access]
disallow ".*" : store;
disallow ":*" : store;
allow "local:*" : all;
=== no-error case ===

=== domain number clash case ... will clobber and remove sample PMDA ===
--- after Install
# 
# Name  Id      IPC     IPC Params      File/Cmd
# Performance Metrics Domain Specifications
# This file is automatically generated during the build
root	1	pipe	binary		/var/lib/pcp/pmdas/root/pmdaroot
pmcd	2	dso	pmcd_init	/var/lib/pcp/pmdas/pmcd/pmda_pmcd.so
proc	3	pipe	binary		/var/lib/pcp/pmdas/proc/pmdaproc -d 3
pmproxy	4	dso	pmproxy_init	/var/lib/pcp/pmdas/mmv/pmda_mmv.so
xfs	11	pipe	binary		/var/lib/pcp/pmdas/xfs/pmdaxfs -d 11
whacko	29	pipe	binary 		/var/lib/pcp/testsuite/1196.dir/pmdas/whacko/pmdawhacko -d 29 
sampledso	30	dso	sample_init	/var/lib/pcp/pmdas/sample/pmda_sample.so 
linux	60	pipe	binary		/var/lib/pcp/pmdas/linux/pmdalinux
mmv	70	dso	mmv_init	/var/lib/pcp/pmdas/mmv/pmda_mmv.so 
kvm	95	pipe	binary		/var/lib/pcp/pmdas/kvm/pmdakvm -d 95
jbd2	122	dso	jbd2_init	/var/lib/pcp/pmdas/jbd2/pmda_jbd2.so 
dm	129	pipe	binary 		/var/lib/pcp/pmdas/dm/pmdadm -d 129 
simple	253	pipe	binary 		/var/lib/pcp/pmdas/simple/pmdasimple -d 253

======================
= sample daemon PMDA =
======================
PMCD should communicate with the sample daemon via a pipe or a socket? [pipe] Installing files ...
make: Nothing to be done for `install'.
Updating the Performance Metrics Name Space (PMNS) ...
Terminate PMDA if already installed ...
Updating the PMCD control file, and notifying PMCD ...
Check sample metrics have appeared ... 4 warnings, 213 metrics and 1437 values

=== domain name clash case ... will clobber and remove sample PMDA ===
--- after Install
# 
# Name  Id      IPC     IPC Params      File/Cmd
# Performance Metrics Domain Specifications
# This file is automatically generated during the build
root	1	pipe	binary		/var/lib/pcp/pmdas/root/pmdaroot
pmcd	2	dso	pmcd_init	/var/lib/pcp/pmdas/pmcd/pmda_pmcd.so

xfs	11	pipe	binary		/var/lib/pcp/pmdas/xfs/pmdaxfs -d 11

linux	60	pipe	binary		/var/lib/pcp/pmdas/linux/pmdalinux
mmv	70	dso	mmv_init	/var/lib/pcp/pmdas/mmv/pmda_mmv.so 
kvm	95	pipe	binary		/var/lib/pcp/pmdas/kvm/pmdakvm -d 95
